mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select:
SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
DEV_NAME as devName, ROUND(sum(IO_STAT_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) as sumIoStat FROM (SELECT DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, TIME, avgMerge(IO_STAT_AVG) as IO_STAT_AVG FROM AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, TIME) t GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
DEV_NAME as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_STAT_AVG),2) as avgRdStat , maxMerge(RD_STAT_MAX) as maxRdStat, minMerge(RD_STAT_MIN) as minRdStat
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_STAT_AVG),2) as avgWrStat , maxMerge(WR_STAT_MAX) as maxWrStat, minMerge(WR_STAT_MIN) as minWrStat
ROUND(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as avgUtilization , maxMerge(UTILIZATION_MAX) as maxUtilization, minMerge(UTILIZATION_MIN) as minUtilization
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT
ROUND(avgMerge(IO_STAT_AVG),2) as avgIoStat
ROUND((avgMerge(RD_REQ_PS_AVG) + avgMerge(WR_REQ_PS_AVG)),2) as avgReqps
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M io WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DOMAIN_ID=${domainId} AND io.DEV_NAME in (${devNames})

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
DEV_NAME as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_LATENCY_AVG),2) as avgRdLatency , maxMerge(RD_LATENCY_MAX) as maxRdLatency, minMerge(RD_LATENCY_MIN) as minRdLatency
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_LATENCY_AVG),2) as avgWrLatency , maxMerge(WR_LATENCY_MAX) as maxWrLatency, minMerge(WR_LATENCY_MIN) as minWrLatency
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
DEV_NAME as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_REQ_PS_AVG),2) as avgRdReqps , maxMerge(RD_REQ_PS_MAX) as maxRdReqps, minMerge(RD_REQ_PS_MIN) as minRdReqps
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_REQ_PS_AVG),2) as avgWrReqps , maxMerge(WR_REQ_PS_MAX) as maxWrReqps, minMerge(WR_REQ_PS_MIN) as minWrReqps
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(DEV_NAME) as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_LATENCY_AVG),2) as avgRdLatency
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_LATENCY_AVG),2) as avgWrLatency
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(DEV_NAME) as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_REQ_PS_AVG),2) as avgRdReqps
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_REQ_PS_AVG),2) as avgWrReqps
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(DEV_NAME) as devName,
ROUND(avgMerge(RD_STAT_AVG),2) as avgRdStat
ROUND(avgMerge(WR_STAT_AVG),2) as avgWrStat
ROUND(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as avgUtilization
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(DEV_NAME) as devName, ROUND(sum(IO_STAT_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 1800, 1800, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) as sumIoStat FROM (SELECT DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, TIME, avgMerge(IO_STAT_AVG) as IO_STAT_AVG FROM AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, TIME) t GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

select b.uuid as uuid, a.DEV_NAME as devName, a.TIME as time, a.SIZE as size, a.UTILIZATION as utilization from (select TIME, DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, round(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as UTILIZATION, round(avgMerge(SIZE_AVG),2) as SIZE from AGG_DOMAIN_IO_STAT_30M where TIME between ${startTime} and ${endTime} and CLUSTER_ID = ${clusterId} GROUP BY TIME, DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME) as a join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} as b on a.DOMAIN_ID=b.id order by uuid, devName, time
